crime.value: Stabbing murder in public space with knife attack
crime.quote: The man shoves the knife into Ally's ribcage, her face a mask of horror, blood spills over her crisp white shirt

victim.value: Ally, the narrator's best friend and roommate
victim.quote: my best friend, whom thanks to much persuasion on my part, I was now living with in the cramped apartment

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown figure with white eyes, motive unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: The figure shifts his gaze to mine and his eye are white, the type of white from the first frost

investigator.value: Angel, the narrator and witness to the murder
investigator.quote: Hands shake me awake, "Angel! Hurry up you'll make us late again!"

red_herring.value: Pooh Bear shirt as bad luck omen misdirects from real threat
red_herring.quote: it always gave me bad luck, but whatever. I didn't have time to change

clue_fairness.value: Knife glinting in overcast light shown to reader simultaneously with protagonist
clue_fairness.quote: Something glints in the pale overcast light. It was a knife!

social_world.value: Young women sharing cramped apartment, economic constraints implied
social_world.quote: the cramped apartment that we bought

reveal_mechanic.value: Attacker's distinctive white eyes as identifying feature
reveal_mechanic.quote: his eye are white, the type of white from the first frost over a freshly cut lawn

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's trauma from witnessing best friend's murder creates psychological vulnerability
investigator_wound.quote: I can't think, one word form through the fog. Gone. Gone. Gone. Gone. Gone. Gone.

_meta.title: ebook natalie m wood the other side of me
